defs: One who composes; an author. Specifically, an author of a piece of music.
quotes: If the thoughts of such authors have nothing in them, they at least . . . show an honest industry and a good intention in the composer.
His [Mozart's] most brilliant and solid glory is founded upon his talents as a composer.

defs: One who, or that which, quiets or calms; one who adjusts a difference.
quotes: Sweet composers of the pensive soul.
